CONFIRMED — g/dL↔g/L hemoglobin conversions already present (lines 172–182, factors 10.0 and 0.1). Calcium, magnesium, fT4, urate conversions: absent. pmol/L and ng/dL unit type definitions: absent. Prompt §2 correctly requires these unit type definitions before conversion entries reference them.

changes.result: CONFIRMED — all six factors in evidence file match prompt table exactly: Ca 0.2495, Mg 0.4114, fT4 12.871, Hb ×10, Urate ×59.5. Test vectors confirmed: 9.4 mg/dL → 2.35 mmol/L, 2.1 mg/dL → 0.86 mmol/L, 1.2 ng/dL → 15.45 pmol/L, 14.6 g/dL → 146 g/L, 5.8 mg/dL → 345.1 µmol/L. Caveats confirmed: corrected calcium formula-derived, fT4 assay-specific, urate/urea separation.

PASS — conversions are pure arithmetic with governed factors from evidence file. Passthrough risk eliminated by _STRICT_CONVERSION_BIOMARKERS requirement (§3.3) and Phase 2 STOP. Haemoglobin scoring band migration is numeric (×10) with no polarity change. No Intelligence Core analytical logic is altered — only unit conversion dispatch and scoring unit alignment.
